all_news.title: Apple alza i prezzi di Mac e iPad: fino al 25% in più. L’iPhone è salvo (per ora)

all_news.title: The White House is asking OpenAI to slow roll the release of its new model over safety concerns
all_news.snippet: OpenAI reportedly plans to share its newest model, GPT 5.6, with a select group of partners instead of with the broader public. The reason: the Trump administration told it to.
